summary: E5 Testing Complete: Policy Guidance Engine feature fully functional. All 39 backend tests pass (5 new for E5). Conflicts now include guidance and impact_description fields. Resolve endpoint requires ConflictResolution model with min 10 char resolution_notes. New guidance endpoint returns full conflict details. Frontend shows collapsible Impact/Recommendation sections, Detail sheet panel, and enhanced Resolve dialog with mandatory notes validation.

issues: Console warning: <span> cannot be a child of <option> - minor React hydration warning in filter dropdowns, does not affect functionality (same as E4)
Console warning: chart width/height -1 on initial load - Recharts ResponsiveContainer warning, charts render correctly after layout settles

passed_tests: Backend: All 39 pytest tests pass (5 new for E5)
Backend: GET /api/policy-engine/conflicts returns conflicts with guidance and impact_description fields
Backend: POST /api/policy-engine/conflicts/{id}/resolve with ConflictResolution body (min 10 chars resolution_notes) returns 200
Backend: POST /api/policy-engine/conflicts/{id}/resolve with short notes (<10 chars) returns 422
Backend: GET /api/policy-engine/conflicts/{id}/guidance returns full guidance details including resolved status
Backend: Resolve creates POLICY_CONFLICT_RESOLVED audit log entry in GET /api/audit
Frontend: PolicyEnginePage loads with 9 conflict cards showing Impact and Recommendation collapsible sections
Frontend: Impact toggle expands to show impact_description text
Frontend: Recommendation toggle expands to show guidance text
Frontend: Click Detail button opens side sheet with conflict details
Frontend: Detail sheet shows Impact and Guidance sections for unresolved conflicts
Frontend: Detail sheet shows 'Documented Resolution' box for resolved conflicts with resolved_by, date, and notes
Frontend: Resolve dialog shows username field (displays logged-in user)
Frontend: Resolve dialog has textarea for notes with 10 char min validation
Frontend: Confirm button disabled until notes >= 10 chars
Frontend: After resolving, success toast 'Conflict resolved and logged to audit trail' appears
Frontend: Overview page KPI shows '1 Policy Conflicts' with '9 totali' subtitle
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created for E5. Uses existing conflicts from E4 seed data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: E5 Policy Guidance Engine complete. Conflicts now have guidance and impact_description fields populated from GUIDANCE dict in policy_engine.py. ConflictResolution Pydantic model requires resolution_notes (min 10 chars) and resolved_by fields. Guidance endpoint at /api/policy-engine/conflicts/{id}/guidance returns full conflict details including resolved status. Frontend has collapsible sections for Impact (amber) and Recommendation (blue), Detail sheet panel using Shadcn Sheet component, and enhanced Resolve dialog with mandatory notes validation. Previous iterations: iteration_7.json (E4 Policy Engine), iteration_6.json (E3 DLgs262+Readiness), iteration_5.json (E2 SOX Wizard).

new_backend_endpoints.guidance_endpoint: GET /api/policy-engine/conflicts/{id}/guidance - returns full conflict details with guidance, impact_description, resolved status

updated_backend_endpoints.resolve_endpoint: POST /api/policy-engine/conflicts/{id}/resolve - now requires ConflictResolution body with resolution_notes (min 10 chars) and resolved_by

ui_elements_verified: Collapsible Impact section (amber color, AlertTriangle icon)
Collapsible Recommendation section (blue color, Lightbulb icon)
Detail sheet shows Impact and Guidance for unresolved conflicts
Detail sheet shows Documented Resolution box for resolved conflicts
Resolve dialog with username field (read-only, shows logged-in user)
Resolve dialog with notes textarea (10 char min validation)
Confirm button disabled until notes >= 10 chars
Overview KPI shows critical conflicts with total count
